tasks.subject: Task 1: 앱 — 노트 파서 + 슬롯 상수
tasks.description:
**Goal:** TipTap JSON을 RemarkableNoteSpec으로 파싱하는 순수 함수와 섹션 라벨↔슬롯 매핑 상수.

**Files:** create app/src/lib/remarkable/slots.ts, app/src/lib/remarkable/parseRemarkableNote.ts; test app/tests/unit/remarkable/slots.test.ts, app/tests/unit/remarkable/parseRemarkableNote.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/remarkable/

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/remarkable/slots.ts", "app/src/lib/remarkable/parseRemarkableNote.ts", "app/tests/unit/remarkable/slots.test.ts", "app/tests/unit/remarkable/parseRemarkableNote.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/remarkable/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parseRemarkableNote returns null without signature", "signature recognized at content[0] or content[1]", "first URL under a label collected per slot", "unknown labels ignored, duplicate labels keep first", "matchSlotLabel maps 5 Korean labels"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: 브릿지 — 리마커블 호스트 설정 로더
tasks.description:
**Goal:** BRIDGE_REMARKABLE_HOSTS_FILE JSON을 읽어 별칭→SSH 좌표로 해석하는 모듈.

**Files:** create bridge/src/remarkableHosts.ts; test bridge/src/remarkableHosts.test.ts

**Verify:** cd bridge && npx tsc -p . && node --test dist/remarkableHosts.test.js

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/remarkableHosts.ts", "bridge/src/remarkableHosts.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && npx tsc -p . && node --test dist/remarkableHosts.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["valid hosts file resolves via lookupRemarkableHost", "missing/invalid file yields empty table without throwing", "host-less entry skipped, user defaults to root", "remarkableHostsConfigured reflects loaded entries"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: 브릿지 — 배경화면 적용 코어 로직
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 슬롯 파일 매핑 + 의존성 주입형 applyWallpapers + 인증/검증 processWallpaperRequest — I/O 전부 주입, 페이크로 완전 테스트.

**Files:** create bridge/src/remarkable.ts, bridge/src/remarkable.test.ts; modify bridge/package.json

**Verify:** cd bridge && npx tsc -p . && node --test dist/remarkable.test.js

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/remarkable.ts", "bridge/src/remarkable.test.ts", "bridge/package.json"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && npx tsc -p . && node --test dist/remarkable.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RM_SLOT_FILES covers 5 slot ids with restart flags", "applyWallpapers returns 400 unknown_host for undefined host", "per-slot failure isolated, others still processed", "restartXochitl called once when a restart slot succeeds", "processWallpaperRequest returns 401/503/400 for bad token/unconfigured/bad body"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: 브릿지 — 실 의존성 + HTTP 핸들러 + 서버 배선
tasks.description:
**Goal:** sharp/fetch/ssh 실 의존성 + POST /remarkable/wallpaper 핸들러 + server.ts 라우트·호스트 로드 배선.

**Files:** modify bridge/src/remarkable.ts, bridge/src/server.ts, bridge/package.json

**Verify:** cd bridge && npm install && npm test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/remarkable.ts", "bridge/src/server.ts", "bridge/package.json"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && npm install && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["realWallpaperDeps wires fetch+sharp+ssh", "handleRemarkableWallpaper returns processWallpaperRequest result as JSON", "server.ts loads remarkable hosts and routes POST /remarkable/wallpaper", "npm run build passes with no type errors", "Task 3 node:test still all pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: 앱 — 배경화면 적용 클라이언트
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 브릿지 POST /remarkable/wallpaper를 호출하고 슬롯별 결과를 반환하거나 분류된 에러를 던지는 클라이언트.

**Files:** create app/src/lib/remarkable/applyWallpaper.ts; test app/tests/unit/remarkable/applyWallpaper.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/remarkable/applyWallpaper.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/remarkable/applyWallpaper.ts", "app/tests/unit/remarkable/applyWallpaper.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/remarkable/applyWallpaper.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["returns results array on 200", "throws classified WallpaperApplyError for 401/503/400", "throws network error when fetch rejects", "throws server_error on unexpected 200 shape"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: 앱 — RemarkableActionBar 컴포넌트 + 라우트 배선
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 에디터를 받아 리마커블 노트면 배너+[적용] 버튼을 렌더하고 슬롯별 상태를 표시하는 컴포넌트 + 모바일/데스크탑 노트 화면 배선.

**Files:** create app/src/lib/editor/remarkable/RemarkableActionBar.svelte, app/tests/unit/remarkable/RemarkableActionBar.test.ts; modify app/src/routes/note/[id]/+page.svelte, app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/remarkable/RemarkableActionBar.test.ts && npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/remarkable/RemarkableActionBar.svelte", "app/tests/unit/remarkable/RemarkableActionBar.test.ts", "app/src/routes/note/[id]/+page.svelte", "app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/remarkable/RemarkableActionBar.test.ts && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["renders nothing for non-remarkable note", "renders host + slot labels + apply button for remarkable note", "apply click calls applyWallpaper and shows per-slot status", "empty notice + disabled button when no slots", "npm run check passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: 브릿지 배포 설정 + 문서
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Quadlet 유닛에 리마커블 호스트 파일 마운트·배선 + bridge/README.md에 셋업 절차·노트 형식·펌웨어 한계 문서화.

**Files:** modify bridge/deploy/term-bridge.container, bridge/README.md

**Verify:** cd bridge && podman build -t term-bridge:test . 2>&1 | tail -5

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/deploy/term-bridge.container", "bridge/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && podman build -t term-bridge:test . 2>&1 | tail -5", "acceptanceCriteria": ["term-bridge.container mounts remarkable.json read-only + sets BRIDGE_REMARKABLE_HOSTS_FILE", "unit header comment documents remarkable.json setup + ssh key", "README documents note format, endpoint, firmware 3.x + OTA caveats"]}
```
